name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans from $100–$50,000 in Memphis, TN, with same-day funding available to applicants with bad credit or prior bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is a Memphis, Tennessee-based car title lender operating from a single branch at 1473 S Trezevant St, Suite 23, in the 38114 zip code. The company targets local residents who need rapid access to cash, using the tagline 'Sign up by noon, get cash today' as its core pitch. Business hours extend Monday through Friday from 9am to 7pm and Saturday from 10am to 5pm, with no Sunday availability. Customers can reach the branch by phone at 1-888-903-0217 or email at service@swiftloans.com.

The company's primary product is a vehicle title loan, where borrowers use their car's title as collateral to unlock funds while retaining use of the vehicle. Loan amounts span two tiers: $100–$2,000 for smaller emergencies and $2,000–$50,000 for larger financing needs. The stated process is three steps — apply online, receive cash and keep the car, then repay the loan to get the title back. Swift Title Loans explicitly accepts applicants with bad credit histories and past bankruptcies, positioning itself for borrowers who may be declined by banks, credit unions, or mainstream personal loan lenders.

Same-day funding when applications are submitted before noon is the company's main competitive differentiator. Customer reviews consistently name a staff member called Alfred as a standout employee who walks applicants through paperwork in plain language and answers questions patiently. Extended weekday hours until 7pm offer more flexibility than typical 9-to-5 lenders. The online application is secured with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption, and in-branch reviewers describe the office as clean and welcoming. Saturday hours add further accessibility for working borrowers.

Swift Title Loans is a workable option for Memphis residents who need fast cash against vehicle equity and cannot access conventional credit. However, the location page discloses no APR, interest rates, or fee structures — a significant transparency gap for a product category where national averages frequently exceed 100–300% APR. Several customer reviews share strikingly similar phrasing and generic language, which raises mild questions about their organic nature. The company has one physical location, limiting its reach strictly to the Memphis area. Prospective borrowers should request full written APR and fee disclosure before signing any agreement and should compare alternatives such as credit union payday alternative loans or CDFI products when available.
pros: Same-day cash available when applying by noon on business days
Accepts bad credit and past bankruptcies with no apparent screening barrier
Wide loan range — $100 to $50,000 across two tiers covers both small emergencies and larger needs
Borrower keeps the vehicle during the loan term
Extended weekday hours until 7pm and Saturday 10am–5pm
Online application secured with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption
Multiple reviewers cite Alfred by name for patient, plain-language guidance through paperwork
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the location page
Single Memphis location only — not available outside the immediate area
No mobile app for payment management (noted as a gap by multiple reviewers)
Parking reported as crowded during busy periods
best_for: Memphis, TN residents who need same-day cash and have vehicle equity to leverage
Borrowers with bad credit or prior bankruptcy who are rejected by conventional lenders
People needing amounts between $2,000 and $50,000 against a higher-value vehicle
Working borrowers who need evening or Saturday hours to apply in person
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents with bad credit or bankruptcy history who need cash quickly and own a vehicle they can use as collateral. The main caveat is that the company discloses no APR or fee information publicly, and title loans as a product class typically carry very high interest rates — borrowers should demand full written cost disclosure before signing.
services: Online loan application with SSL/TLS security
In-person branch service in Memphis, TN
